title: The Unseen Artist
description: A mysterious figure known only as 'The Unseen Artist' begins creating public murals overnight, infusing the city with vibrant colors and unexpected themes. The murals provoke a wave of artistic expression and community pride, but also simmering debates about the boundaries of public art.
flavor: Each morning, Gitizens awaken to new surprises adorning their streets.
response_hint: Implementing regulations on public art could help maintain order, but it risks stifling creativity.
